scripts.dev:stdb: set -a && source spacetimedb/.env && set +a && spacetime start --listen-addr 127.0.0.1:3001 --non-interactive
scripts.dev:publish: node scripts/inject-env.mjs && spacetime publish inkwell -y --server http://127.0.0.1:3001 --module-path spacetimedb && spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir src/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb
scripts.dev:publish:fresh: node scripts/inject-env.mjs && spacetime publish inkwell -y --delete-data --server http://127.0.0.1:3001 --module-path spacetimedb && spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir src/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb
scripts.publish:maincloud: node scripts/inject-env.mjs && spacetime publish inkwell-live -y --server maincloud --module-path spacetimedb && spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir src/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb
